- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Next.js workspace bootstrapped manually in the current folder because `create-next-app` rejected the folder name as an npm package name.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Built a premium editorial SaaS shell with real entity flows for prompts, competitors, locations, providers, run jobs, ingestion, citations, recommendations, and reports.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions were required by project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
  `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` all complete successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Skipped because the workspace already has standard npm scripts and did not require a VS Code task for completion.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Skipped because launch and debug were not requested.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README and workspace instructions are present, current, and cleaned of HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
